text:
This province starts the game faceup and cannot be turned facedown. It cannot be a stronghold province.
Characters played from this province enter play with 1 additional fate on them.
name: Toshi Ranbo

text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – look at your opponent's hand.
flavorText: "See where the latch was splintered - this was not the work of shinobi, as they would have us believe."
name: Scene of the Crime

text:
Cannot be a stronghold province.
During conflicts at this province, you may play characters from your dynasty discard pile into the conflict as if they were in your hand.
name: Gateway to Meido

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is defending, sacrifice this character and choose a character you control - ready that character and move it to the conflict.
name: Hiruma Signaller

text: No attachments except Weapon. Interrupt: When you sacrifice a character, choose an opponent. That opponent must choose a character he or she controls with lower [conflict-military] skill than the sacrificed character - bow that character.
name: Fifth Tower Watch

text: Reaction: After your opponent spends fate to play a card during a conflict in which this character is participating - gain 1 fate.
flavorText: "Please allow me to finish your composition. Your words inspire me towards the battle chants of the Moto."
name: Sententious Poet

text: Action: During a conflict in which you control a participating Courtier, choose an attachment on a participating character - return that attachment to its owner's hand. That player cannot play copies of that card until the end of the phase.
name: Esteemed Tea House

text: As an additional cost for your opponent to trigger a character ability during a conflict in which this character is attacking, that opponent must spend 1 fate to an unclaimed ring.
name: Magistrate of Reason

text: Disguised Bushi. Action: During a conflict in which this character is attacking, choose a non-unique holding in the attacked province - gain control of that holding and move it to one of your unbroken provinces, if able, discarding each other card in the province. Otherwise, discard it.
name: Akodo Zentarō

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - search the top 5 cards of you conflict deck for a card that shares a Trait with an element of the contested ring, reveal it, and add it to your hand. Shuffle.
name: Shiba Sophist

text: Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating, choose two characters controlled by the same player - move a status token from one of those characters to the other.
flavorText: "I understand it was Seijuro-sama who was seen leaving the commander's battle tent when dawn broke."
name: Shameless Gossip

text: Disguised Cavalry. Action: During a conflict in which this character is participating - switch the contested ring with a ring in the unclaimed ring pool. (The attacking player gains all fate on that ring. Retain the ring's conflict type.)
name: Shinjo Kyōra

text: Pride. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character - that character gets +3 glory until the end of the conflict.
name: Hantei Sotorii

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a defending character you control - until the end of the conflict, that character gets +2[conflict-military] and cannot have its skills reduced. (This includes by attachments, lasting effects, and status tokens.)
name: Give No Ground

text: Action: During a conflict, if you control more honored participating characters than your opponent - after your opponent's next action opportunity, resolve the conflict as if both players passed consecutively.
flavorText: "Its pattern will never appear again." - Shinsei
name: Moment of Perfect Beauty

text: Attach to a ring. Reaction: After fate is placed on attached ring - resolve that ring's effect as if you were the attacking player.
flavorText: "Does an enlightened person fall under the law of cause and effect?"
name: Greater Understanding

text: Attach to a unique character you control. Limited. Restricted. Reaction: After attached character wins a conflict, if you are more honorable than your opponent, choose a card in your conflict discard pile - add that card to your hand.
name: Blade of 10,000 Battles

text: Action: During a conflict, if you have fewer cards in your hand than your opponent - as an additional cost for your opponent to play an event during this conflict, that opponent must give you 1 honor. (Max 1 per conflict.)
name: Command Respect

text: Action: During a conflict, choose a participating Bushi character - honor that character. At the end of the conflict, discard any status tokens on it.
flavorText: "One masters war by embracing peace." - Tao of Shinsei
name: Purity of Spirit

text: Reaction: After an opponent wins a conflict, if he or she is more honorable than you, choose a participating character that opponent controls and a character in that opponent's home - switch those characters' locations.
name: False Loyalties

text: Attach to a unique character you control. Limited. Restricted. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which attached character is not participating, choose a participating character - bow that character and move attached character to the conflict.
name: Adorned Barcha

text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, choose a participating Bushi character - that character gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. If it wins the conflict, honor it.
flavorText: "The quality of a warrior's skill can be measured in a single stroke" - Book of Sun Tao
name: A Perfect Cut
